content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch delta against the fork point, excluding live .ralph-burning state. `nix develop --command cargo test --quiet`, `nix develop --command cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings`, `cargo +nightly fmt --check`, and `nix build` passed. Found one prompt-rendering correctness issue.

## Amendments

1. `src/contexts/bead_workflow/project_prompt.rs:315` feeds every whitespace token into path detection, and `src/contexts/bead_workflow/project_prompt.rs:337` accepts any token containing `/` as an explicit path. That makes ordinary prose like `AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md` render a bogus `Where to Look` entry for `/`, and similarly promotes slash-separated prose into file pointers. This violates the requirement to include the section only for explicit file/path pointers rather than guessing. Tighten bare-token detection, or only honor backticked/path-section entries, and add a regression for slash separators.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: The prompt renderer is the drain foundation, so systematically injecting bogus navigation pointers can mislead follow-on agents even when the bead description has no real Where-to-Look paths.
